Hanumanji'b4s identity?

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2007-07-27 · 6 answers
Dear Prabhujis,

I would like to know Sri Hanuman'b4s position. Is he a Jiva Tattva?

Is truth that he is a partial incarnation of Sada Shiva?

worshiping Hanuman separate from Sita Rama, is bonafide?

Thanks

Dasanudasa

Krishna Kripa Dasa
user [38] · 2007-07-28
Nice. Where is it from?
user [38] · 2007-07-27
Some refs are in Hanuman article on Wiki.
user [19] · 2007-07-27
this?
http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hanuman
user [37] · 2007-07-28
Dear Krishna Kripa Prabhu

Here is small description of Hanuman Tattva. HanumanJi gets worshipped along with Lordships Sri Sita Ram as their foremost servant. It will be an offence to worship him separately as supreme personality. There are many temples in India which worship exclusively Hanuman but still the mood is that he is the foremost servant of Supreme personality of Godhead Lord Sri Ramchandra so it makes more sense to worship him alongside Lord Ramchandra not separately.

please see document hanuman.txt attached
user [78] · 2007-07-30
What I heard about Hanumanji:

see document anjaneya.txt attached.
user [181] · 2010-11-07
Om Hanumate Rudratmakay Hum Phat. Yes, He is the incarnation of Shiva. He is a jeeva tattva and lves with us. Any bhakta wants him and prays for him gets Him.
